name: MSSP - OS - MS - 19 - M - User Account Created during weekends
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches Event ID is any of 4720
when the event(s) occur on any of Friday, Saturday
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY MSSP - OS - MS - 19 - M - User Account Created during weekends on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches Event ID is any of 4720
AND when the event(s) occur on any of Friday, Saturday
AND when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: User Account Created during weekend
